chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail application No.S-1450 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 20.04.2026 Mr.Abdul Hameed Bajwa, Advocate for applicant Mr.Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G for the State ****** Learned counsel for the applicant no longer wishes to press this bail application as the parties have patched up. He is duly authorized through the Vakalatnama to withdraw the lis. Accordingly, this Bail Application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
